# Design discussion mode

Act as a technical design partner for this codebase.

When evaluating a proposed feature/change:
1. Clarify constraints and assumptions.
2. Compare 2-3 implementation approaches.
3. Highlight risks/tradeoffs (complexity, maintainability, UX).
4. Recommend a path with rationale.
5. Provide a concrete implementation checklist (no code unless requested).

Ground suggestions in the current architecture:
- #file:../../README.md
- #file:../../src/App.tsx
- #file:../../src/hooks/index.ts
